summary: Iter 26 — Push Analytics period filter (BE) + mobile-first refactor (Push controls + Reviews per-store card stack). All BE & FE acceptance criteria verified live. Backend: 17/17 pytest passed against live API — auth gate (401 anon w/ and w/o period), default period='all' backward compat, schema echoes 'period' for all 6 values (today/yesterday/7d/30d/month/all), bogus period falls back to unbounded, subscribers count invariant across all periods (live snapshot), broadcast-level totals + recent_broadcasts correctly bound to created_at window — fired a new broadcast and verified it appears in today/7d/30d/month/all but NOT in yesterday window. Regression OK: /api/analytics/reviews, /analytics/store-landings, /analytics/detailed, /push/broadcast all still 200. Frontend mobile (375x812): push-analytics-section has NO horizontal overflow (scrollW=clientW=349); body 375==375; reset-trigger, history-toggle, period-select all visible and within section bounds (all between sectionLeft=12 and sectionRight=363). Header layout collapses correctly — title 'Push Analytics' on top, period-select full-width below, then Reset + Storico side-by-side flex-1. Period selector triggers re-fetch (/api/push/analytics?period=today verified via network listener). 4 KPI tiles render (Iscritti totali/Notifiche inviate/Click totali/CTR medio). Reviews section on /dashboard mobile renders as <ul> card stack with 1 <li data-testid='reviews-store-row'> showing 'QA Demo Store / /s/qa-demo-store / 3 CLICK' in amber typography + Landing/Vendor mini-tiles (3/0) + 100% progress bar (after seeding 3 store_landing_review_click events). Desktop (1440x900): push controls in column, no overflow; reviews section shows <table> with tablesVisible=1, ulsVisible=0.

ui_bugs.issue: On mobile (375px) the inner broadcasts history table 'Cli' (clicks) column is partially clipped on the right edge inside the card. The OUTER section scrollWidth==clientWidth (no horizontal page overflow), but the table content overflows its own cell area, hiding part of the 'Clicks' column header and values. Not in scope of this iter's mobile-first refactor (which targeted only the header controls), but worth flagging since the user complaint was about mobile UX of this same card.

action_items: OPTIONAL (not requested in this iter): wrap the broadcasts-history <table> inside PushAnalytics in a horizontal-scroll container on mobile (overflow-x-auto) or convert it to a card list like the Reviews section, so the 'Cli' column is not clipped on 375px viewports.
critical_code_review_comments: push.py:401-427 — _period_to_dates logic is now duplicated between /api/push/analytics (inline) and routers.analytics._period_to_dates. Both use Europe/Rome day boundaries for today/yesterday/month. Suggest extracting to a shared helper (e.g., utils/period.py) to avoid drift if a new label is added. Functional today, drift risk only.

push.py:432 — broadcast_q['created_at'] uses {'$gte': start_iso, '$lte': end_iso} with ISO-string comparison. Works because all push_broadcasts.created_at values are written via datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat() — same lexicographic order as chronological. Note: if any legacy doc was inserted with a naïve datetime serialization (no tzinfo), the comparison would silently exclude it. Defensive: consider adding a $exists check or migrating to BSON Date.

PushAnalytics.js header refactor (lines 121-178 per review request): the period selector uses shadcn <Select> on its own line full-width on mobile, with Reset+Storico beneath using flex flex-1 sm:flex-none. Verified live: all 3 controls visible, fit within card, period change triggers correct API call. Good mobile-first pattern.

AnalyticsDetailed.js:624-740 ReviewsAnalyticsSection — dual-view pattern (hidden sm:block / sm:hidden) duplicates row markup between the <ul> card stack and the <table>. ~120 lines of redundant rendering. Refactor opportunity: extract a single StoreRow component rendered in both containers, OR collapse to a single responsive layout using flex/grid breakpoints. Not blocking — current implementation works and tests cleanly separate the breakpoints.

AnalyticsResetButton.js:51-67 — new prop mobileFullWidth is opt-in via consumer; PushAnalytics passes it but other call sites still use the old fixed layout. Document expected usage in component header to prevent regression as adoption spreads.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_push_analytics_period.py (NEW — 17 tests covering auth gate, schema echo for all 6 periods, default=all, subscribers invariant, window-bound totals/recent_broadcasts, regression on 4 sibling endpoints)

success_rate.backend: 100% (17/17 new + all iter_25 endpoints still green via regression)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (mobile overflow PASS, period selector network PASS, KPIs PASS, reviews card stack PASS on mobile + table PASS on desktop, no overflow on desktop push section)

test_credentials: admin@example.com / admin123 — verified via /api/auth/login on REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.
seed_data_creation: Seeded 3 store_landing_review_click events for store_id=6a383aa59bbc459260a5f6e7 (QA Demo Store) + vendor_id=6a393fb7f85d3846a0034704 (QA Manager Test) via public POST /api/analytics — needed so the reviews-store-row card actually renders on mobile (otherwise empty-state). Also fired several TEST_PERIOD/TEST_RECENT/TEST_REGR push broadcasts via /api/push/broadcast for the totals window-filter tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reviews section lives under /dashboard (NOT /analytics-detailed — that route 404s, no menu link either). Path: /dashboard → AnalyticsDetailed embedded for admin → ReviewsAnalyticsSection sibling under data-testid='analytics-detailed'. Per-store rows use data-testid='reviews-store-row' (LI tag on mobile, TR on desktop — but always same testid). Push period selector is shadcn Select; data-testid='push-period-select' is on the SelectTrigger — to programmatically change you click the trigger then click the SelectItem labeled 'Oggi' (or any other PERIOD_OPTIONS label). The new BE param is `?period=today|yesterday|7d|30d|month|all`; unknown values silently behave like 'all' but the echoed 'period' field returns the raw input. Subscribers totals are NEVER period-filtered (covered by test_subscribers_invariant_across_periods). One legitimate residual UX nit: the broadcasts-history table inside PushAnalytics still slightly clips the 'Cli' (clicks) column on 375px because the table is not wrapped in overflow-x-auto. Not in scope for this iter but the user complaint covered mobile UX of this card — main agent may want to follow up.
rca of the issue: Feature addition (period filter + mobile-first refactor). Acceptance criteria coverage: (1) BE GET /api/push/analytics?period=X for all 6 values ✅; (2) default ='all' backward compat ✅; (3) auth gate ✅; (4) subscribers NOT filtered ✅ (invariant test); (5) totals & recent_broadcasts window-bound ✅ (fired-new-broadcast assertion); (6) tenant isolation preserved (uses org_id from current_user) — implicit via test_each_period_returns_200 succeeding only for org_admin; (7) iter_23 push vendor scoping still green via regression on /push/broadcast ✅; (8) FE mobile no horizontal overflow on push-analytics-section ✅ (scrollW=clientW=349); (9) FE mobile period selector cliccable + re-fetch ✅ (network listener captured ?period=today); (10) FE mobile Reset/Storico flex-1 distributed equally ✅ (widths 153.5 vs 147.5); (11) FE desktop controls return to column right of title ✅ (no overflow at 1440px); (12) FE mobile reviews section renders ul/li card stack with name+slug+amber click count+landing/vendor mini-tiles+progress bar ✅; (13) FE desktop reviews returns to classic <table> ✅ (tablesVisible=1, ulsVisible=0); (14) empty-state copy 'Nessun click recensione registrato in questo periodo.' preserved — verified by code review (untouched in this iter).
